name: Origin
description: The Creation God of Terramet. Rumored to slumber eternally, no one has heard from it in millennia. It has some unknown connection to The Stream.

name: The Hero
description:
(Lawful Good)The God of Justice, Protection, and Time, The Hero was a mortal attempting to stop the group of mortals that slew Terrine. Ultimately, he failed, but his deeds were rewarded when Origin rose him to Terrine's station and placed the first divine laws binding the Gods.
The Hero created the framework for the blessing of Aasimars.

name: Terrine
description:
(True Neutral) A Dead God that was succeeded by The Hero. The former Goddess of Hearth, Prophecy, and Hope, Terrine was slain my mortals millennia ago. Despite the public knowledge of her demise, many still worship her.
Terrine brought forth the Humans and the Halflings.

name: Ydris
description:
(Neutral Good) The Goddess of the Moon, Tides, and the Night. She ensures a break from the overbearing presence of Grantine.
Ydris brought forth the Elves and Gnomes.

name: Grantine
description:
(Lawful Neutral) The God of the Sun, Glory, and the Day. Grantine ensures the life giving solar warmth is brought to Terramet.
Grantine brought forth the Orcs, Dwarves, and Goliaths.

name: Erebix
description:
(Chaotic Neutral) Erebix is the God of Chaos and Madness. One can never know what to expect when dealing with the God of Chaos, even his followers have no clue what their orders or blessings may be on any given day.
Erebix brought forth the Genasi and Hadozee.

name: Malsol
description:
(Absolute Neutral) The God of Death, Darkness, and Balance. Malsol is the shepherd of deceased souls and the one God that cannot be corrupted or swayed from Neutrality.
Malsol has created no races and grants no Patronage.

name: Kyrantus
description:
(Neutral Evil) The God of Trickery, Subversion, and Lies. Kyrantus has had his fingers in millions of pies over the ages and causes more trouble than even Erebix. Kyrantus has been, in part, responsible for nearly every single major disaster in all of Terramet's history.
Kyrantus brought forth the Goblinoids, Drows, Deep Gnomes, Duergar, and the cursed Undead.

name: Galaea
description:
(Neutral Good) The Goddess of Life, Healing, and Love. Galaea is the kindest of all the gods and the one most often seen. She resides in the realm of the Twilight Forest with Ghene and Thenarius.
Galaea brought forth Centaurs, Harengon, and Loxodon.

name: Ghene
description:
(Lawful Neutral) The God of Harvest, Fertility, and Luck. Ghene is a quiet God that has many dozens of avatars roaming the Material Plane. His Fox form is well known to guide lost travelers and ward off evil from the forests. He resides in the realm of the Twilight Forest with Galaea and Thenarius.
Ghene brought forth the Canid, Tabaxi, and Satyr.

name: Thenarius
description:
(True Neutral) The God of Nature, Growth, and Knowledge. The pinnacle of wisdom, it has long been rumored he holds the largest library in existence within the Twilight Forest, wherein he resides with Ghene and Galaea.
Thenarius brought forth the Leonin, Minotaur, and Firbolg.

name: Ventarta
description:
(Chaotic Good) The Goddess of Air, Freedom, and Travel. She rules over the skies and is one of the four Elemental Gods.
Ventarta brought forth the Aarakocra and Owlfolk.

name: Jelanta
description:
(Chaotic Neutral) The Goddess of Water, Patience, and Pleasure. She rules over the oceans and is one of the four Elemental Gods.
 Jelanta brought forth the Tritons and Tortles.

name: C'thaneg
description:
(Lawful Good) The Dragon God of Earth, Ambition, and Temperance. He is one of the three Dragon Gods and one of the four Elemental Gods.
The Platinum Dragon C'thaneg brought forth the Metallic Dragonborn and the Giants.

name: Searagos
description:
(Neutral Evil) The Dragon God of Fire, Zeal, and Wealth. He is one of the three Dragon Gods and is one of the four Elemental Gods.
The Purple Dragon Searagos brought forth the Chromatic Dragonborn, Lizardfolk, and Kobolds.

name: Bameth
description:
(Chaotic Neutral) the Dragon God of Preservation, Trade, and Nobility. He is one of the three Dragon Gods and one of the strongest amongst Gods.
Bameth brought forth the Gemstone Dragonborn.

name: Quan'ala
description:
(Chaotic Evil) The Fey Goddess of Magic, Retribution, Beuaty, and Envy. She is the Queen of the Fey and the most vindictive God.
Quan'ala brought forth the Fey.

name: Ikarus
description:
(Lawful Evil) The God and Archdevil King of the Hells. His prime aspects are Pride, Duty, and Loyalty. He is recognized as the strongest God on Terramet after Origin vanished. He rules over the Valley of Souls in the Nine Hells.
Ikarus brought forth the Tieflings, Demons, and Fiends.

name: Genesis
description: (True Neutral) The Nature God Phoenix. He represents the Cycle of Nature and Life.

name: Exarch
description: (True Neutral) The Nature God Dragon Turtle. He represents the Oceans and the Seas.

name: Seraphis
description: (True Neutral) The Nature Goddess Thunderbird. She represents the Skies and Mountaintops.

name: Marlus
description: (True Neutral) The Nature God Kirin. He represents the Land and the beasts.

name: Maven
description: (True Neutral) The Nature Goddess Badger. She represents the underground.

name: Kaer'moth, the Vengeful
description: (Chaotic Evil) The Archdevil of Wrath. He rules over the Avernus layer of Hell.

name: Gan'non, the Hoarder
description: (Neutral Evil) The Archdevil of Greed. He rules over the Ruinoutha layer of Hell.

name: Mannagoth, the Devourer
description: (Neutral Evil) The Archdevil of Gluttony. He rules over the Maladomini layer of Hell.

name: Rai'ith, the Craving
description: (Chaotic Evil) The Archdevil of Lust. She rules over the Ahprosia layer of Hell.

name: Lethagrias, the Passive
description: (Neutral Evil) The Archdevil of Sloth. She rules over the Genithith layer of Hell.

name: Nez'thanis, the Insatiable
description: (Lawful Evil) The Archdevil of Envy. He rules over the Stygia layer of Hell.

name: Astaroth, the Sinner
description: (Lawful Evil) The Archdevil of Blasphemy. He rules over the Dismuth layer of Hell.

name: Azazel, the Corruptor
description: (Chaotic Evil) The Archdevil of Corruption. He rules over the Cania layer of Hell.

name: The Demented Keeper
description: (Chaotic Evil) The Eldritch Horror of Insanity, Dreams, and Corruption. It has many Elder Brains and Mind Flayers as its servants and followers.

name: The Final Umbrage
description: (Chaotic Evil) The Eldritch Horror of Entropy, Undeath, and Nihilistic Disorder. It's followers primarily consist of Vampires, Beholders, and other Undead.

name: The Forgotten Call
description: (Chaotic Evil) The Eldritch Horror of Decay, Disease, and Atrophy. It uses Oozes and the Slaad to enact its plots.

name: The Craven End
description: (Chaotic Evil) The Eldritch Horror of Destruction, Senseless Violence, and Extinction. Evil Creatures of Fire compose the bulk of it's followers.

name: The Boundless Gloom
description: (Chaotic Evil) The Eldritch Horror of Despair, the Moon, and Cataclysmic Death. It can force a level of control over werewolves under certain circumstances, though some decide to follow it willingly.

name: The Broken Monarch
description: (Chaotic Evil) The Eldritch Horror of Subversion, Space, and Time. It commands select Quori and Aboleths.
